description: Configure this domain for a mail provider in one step: route inbound mail (MX), authorize sending by merging an SPF include, publish the DKIM selector CNAME for signing, and add a starter DMARC monitoring policy. All records apply together as one group.
variableDescription: %mxHost%: Mail host your provider receives inbound mail at (the MX target). %spfInclude%: SPF include domain for your outbound mail provider (the value placed after include:). %dkimSelector%: DKIM selector label your mail provider assigned (placed before ._domainkey). %dkimTarget%: Hostname your mail provider hosts the DKIM public key at (the CNAME target). %dmarcRua%: Email address that DMARC aggregate (rua) reports are sent to.
